info.description: Task management API with workspace, project, and team collaboration features.
info.title: TaskFlow API

post.description: Send password reset email to the given email address
Authenticate user with email and password, returns JWT tokens
Invalidate refresh token to log out

get.description: Redirect user to GitHub OAuth consent screen
Handle GitHub OAuth callback and return JWT tokens
Redirect user to Google OAuth consent screen
Handle Google OAuth callback and return JWT tokens

post.description: Get a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new user account with email and password
Reset password using the token from the reset email

get.description: List all permissions, optionally grouped by module
List all permission modules
Get all permissions for a specific module
Get a single permission by its ID or slug
get.summary: Get permission by ID or slug

get.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile

Get board view data with tasks grouped by column and filters

Update the title of a column
